key_result: Linear-base q6/top10 side-info recovered corrected PSNR targets but Stage153/152 showed visual/perceptual risk.
Stage151 improved PSNR/SSIM but LPIPS and bad cases motivated returning to original StreamSplat guidance.
Original StreamSplat had lower PSNR than Stage151 but better LPIPS, making it the preferred motion/geometry base.
q4 image residual on StreamSplat base reached 31-32 dB but is not the final Gaussian-domain method.
Half-anchor Gaussian residual keep1/q6 exceeded 29 dB sampled with improved LPIPS/SSIM over original StreamSplat.
Broader 120-task validation passes: gap4 29.7805 dB, gap8 29.5787 dB, LPIPS improves on both gaps.

Extended 24-frame gap4 video and contact sheet are available: /data/hctang/tmp/opencode/mono_dfcgs_runs/stage160_stage158_extended_subjective_evidence/stage160_gap4_stage158_extended_subjective_evidence.mp4; /data/hctang/tmp/opencode/mono_dfcgs_runs/stage160_stage158_extended_subjective_evidence/stage160_gap4_stage158_extended_subjective_evidence_contact_sheet.jpg.
